name: Gorgon
bio:
Former Ocean Guardian, reduced to a Demon Servant. She learned to control curses and became a Demon Blitz Attacker, trapping prey with the Abyssal Orb Staff and her beauty.

Role: Magical Damage Dealer
Specialty: A backline Blitz-type hero that deals AOE Damage to mid-backline enemies and reduces their Accuracy; marks specific targets to deal extra damage in battle.

skillSlots.name: Serpent of Abyss
skillSlots.description: Attacks mid/backline enemies for 95% M.DMG with 50% probability to reduce target's Effect Hit Rate by 25% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Darkness Spew
skillSlots.description: Attacks single enemy target for 280% M.DMG.
